vision_profile.current_state: Karan is a QA Automation Engineer with 5 years of experience, proficient in Selenium, Java, and basic Jenkins, but seeks to transition from scripting to a lead SDET role.
vision_profile.main_blocker: His biggest obstacle is the lack of deep knowledge in test framework architecture, API contract testing, CI/CD pipeline integration, and performance testing basics.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is highly motivated to elevate the perception of QA work to a true engineering discipline and avoid repetitive automation tasks by mastering architectural and backend testing skills.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You can write clean, object-oriented automation scripts in Python, understand core design patterns, and apply fundamental testing methodologies effectively.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building a robust engineering foundation, transforming your automation skills into a strategic asset for quality.

modules.title: Python for Automation & Scripting
lessons: Basic Web Scraping for Test Data

video.title: Introduction to Python Syntax & Data Types
Lists, Tuples, Dictionaries, and Sets
Writing Test Cases with Pytest

science.desc: You encounter a flaky test in a new Python automation suite. Analyze the code to identify potential race conditions or incorrect assertions and propose a fix.

modules.title: OOP & Design Patterns for Test Automation
lessons: Factory Method Pattern for Test Data Generation
Builder Pattern for Complex Test Objects
Strategy Pattern for Different Test Environments

video.title: Encapsulation, Inheritance, Polymorphism
Applying Single Responsibility Principle to Test Classes
Implementing Page Object Model with Factory Pattern
Understanding the Test Pyramid and its Application
Basic Git Commands: Commit, Push, Pull, Branch
Generating Allure Reports for Test Results

science.desc: Explain the concept of the Test Pyramid and how it guides your test automation strategy.

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can effectively test RESTful APIs, implement contract testing, and perform basic database validations, ensuring robust backend quality.
milestones.identity_statement: You are mastering the art of backend quality, ensuring the robustness and reliability of core system services.

video.title: Deep Dive into HTTP Methods and Status Codes
Consumer-Driven Contract Testing Fundamentals
Testing OAuth2 and JWT Authentication

science.desc: A new API endpoint is returning inconsistent data. You suspect a contract violation. How would you use contract testing to diagnose and report the issue?

modules.title: Data Handling & Database Testing
lessons: Test Data Management Strategies for Databases

video.title: Advanced SQL Queries for Data Validation
Verifying ACID Properties in Database Transactions
Testing Document-Oriented Databases (MongoDB)

science.desc: Describe how you would approach testing a complex database migration, ensuring data integrity and minimal downtime.

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can design and implement robust, maintainable, and scalable test automation frameworks, integrating various test types and reporting mechanisms.
milestones.identity_statement: You are the architect of quality, building the foundational structures that ensure software excellence at scale.

modules.title: Test Framework Architecture
lessons: Integrating UI, API, and Database Tests

video.title: Designing a Hybrid Test Automation Framework
Orchestrating UI, API, and DB Tests in a Single Run
Implementing a Plugin Architecture for New Test Types

science.desc: You need to design a new test automation framework from scratch. Outline your architectural considerations and key components.

modules.title: Test Data Management & Mocking
lessons: Strategies for Realistic Test Data Generation

video.title: Generating Synthetic Data with Faker Library
Using WireMock for API Service Virtualization
Implementing Data-Driven Tests with CSV/Excel

science.desc: Your team needs to test a new feature that relies on an external payment gateway. How would you use mocking to enable efficient and reliable testing without hitting the actual gateway?

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can integrate test automation seamlessly into CI/CD pipelines, monitor test health, and conduct foundational performance tests to identify bottlenecks.
milestones.identity_statement: You are the guardian of continuous quality, ensuring every code change enhances system stability and performance.

video.title: Setting up a Jenkins Pipeline for End-to-End Tests
Writing Declarative Jenkins Pipelines for Test Stages
Configuring Parallel Test Execution in Jenkins

science.desc: How would you set up a CI/CD pipeline to automatically run UI, API, and performance tests for a new feature branch before merging to main?

modules.title: Performance Testing Basics
lessons: Introduction to Performance Testing Types (Load, Stress, Soak)
Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for Web Applications
Using JMeter for Basic Load Testing

video.title: Understanding Load, Stress, and Soak Testing
Creating a Simple API Load Test Plan in JMeter
Interpreting Throughput, Latency, and Error Rates

science.desc: A critical API is experiencing slow response times under peak load. You've run a JMeter test. What metrics would you prioritize for analysis, and where would you start looking for the root cause?

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You can effectively test complex microservices architectures and distributed systems, addressing challenges like eventual consistency, service discovery, and inter-service communication.
milestones.identity_statement: You are the quality guardian of complex systems, ensuring seamless interactions and robust performance across distributed environments.

video.title: Strategies for Testing a Multi-Service Workflow
Validating Message Queues and Event Streams
Injecting Faults to Test System Resilience

science.desc: A new microservice is introduced. How would you ensure its integration with existing services is robust, considering potential network latency and service failures?

video.title: Identifying and Testing Race Conditions
Testing Circuit Breaker and Retry Mechanisms
Using Jaeger/Zipkin for End-to-End Request Tracing

science.desc: How do you ensure data consistency and handle eventual consistency scenarios when testing a distributed system with multiple microservices?

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can define and implement comprehensive quality strategies, lead automation teams, establish quality gates, and drive a culture of quality across the development lifecycle.
milestones.identity_statement: You are a visionary leader, shaping the future of quality engineering and empowering teams to deliver exceptional software.

video.title: Crafting a Test Strategy for a New Product Launch
Establishing Automated Quality Gates in CI/CD
Conducting a Test Risk Assessment Workshop

science.desc: As an SDET Lead, how would you influence a development team to adopt a 'shift-left' testing approach and integrate quality earlier in the development cycle?

modules.title: Advanced Test Design & Mentorship
lessons: Advanced Test Case Design Techniques (Pairwise, Boundary Value)

video.title: Applying Pairwise Testing for Complex Configurations
Architecting Systems with Test Hooks and Observability
Strategies for Mentoring Junior SDETs and Fostering Collaboration

science.desc: A new junior SDET joins your team. Design a 3-month onboarding plan focused on developing their automation and architectural thinking skills.

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You can drive enterprise-level quality architecture, implement advanced testing techniques, and innovate in the field of quality engineering, influencing product and system design.
milestones.identity_statement: You are a pioneering architect, continuously innovating and setting new benchmarks for quality and reliability in complex systems.

video.title: Developing a Quality Roadmap for a Large Organization
Automating OWASP Top 10 Vulnerability Checks
Advanced Performance Bottleneck Identification & Resolution

science.desc: Your company is expanding into a new regulated industry. How would you adapt the existing quality architecture and test strategy to ensure compliance and meet new security requirements?

modules.title: AI in Testing & Future Trends
lessons: Quantum Computing & Its Impact on Testing

video.title: Leveraging Generative AI for Test Data and Scenarios
Implementing AI-Powered Element Locators
Exploring Quantum Computing's Impact on Test Automation

science.desc: How do you envision the role of an SDET evolving with the increasing adoption of AI and machine learning in software development and testing?
